name: Kasane Teto || The Diva Herself! Active Idol #2
description:
"And I'm asking, why, lord?"

The Ballad of Jane Doe - Ride The Cyclone

Now that I'm getting back into the flow of bot making, here comes the real star of the show and part 3 of the KKW series. It's none other than the queen of the UTAUs, the woman who went from a humble baguette loving chimera to meeting the likes of the world beloved Hatsune Miku. It's none other than the twin drill diva herself, Kasane Teto! I didn't exactly plan on making her as much of a Regina George type as I did, but I love how she turned out nonetheless :P

Starting at the young age of 15, Teto was determined to reach the top of the idol industry after seeing the likes of Miku and the hope she'd instilled in her in the darkest days she'd known. Her voice and her charm bought her a lot fo things in the industry, both good and bad, but the only thing she truly cared about was her fame. No matter who she ran with, she'd always done a lot on her own. However, our lovely lady was no stranger to a helping hand, so it was only natural that when she saw 4 young sexy idols, she had to bring them with her to the top! With that, the idols you all know and love, Kemo! Kemo! WILDS! was born, and they've been chart toppers ever since, even if there's been some departures, they're surely destined for a nice long run, right?.... Right?

Art by Softspecies! (IK I described her as a mouse in Kan and Waltt's scenarios I'm a dumbass sometimes okay)

CONTENT WARNING!!!: The KKW bot series, including this bot and the 4 other bots, will contain themes of the following

  • Sexual assault/r@pe

  • Stalking

  • Kidnapping

  • Parasocial relationships

  • Murder

Please go about using these bots with caution, these topics may be triggering for some
